ingredients.name: Luca's Kitchen
ingredients.entityContext: Luca's Kitchen in Nishiazabu appears in episode 10 as a dinner setting for an intimate scene, the cozy restaurant atmosphere heightening the emotional closeness the two leads feel during their meal together.
